name: Agents Workspace
description: AI agent workspace with specialist agents for orchestrated, minimal, and self-learning workflows.

tool.description: Tool to install: opencode, claude, copilot, antigravity, all (default: all)

autoupdate.description: Check for updates on container start

postStartCommand: bash -c 'if [ "${AGENTS_WORKSPACE_AUTOUPDATE:-true}" = "true" ]; then TOOL=${TOOL:-all} INCLUDEAGENCY=${INCLUDEAGENCY:-true} sh /usr/local/share/devcontainer-features/agents-workspace-install.sh 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
